name: VEIL
comment: Dev container: the same image as the Dockerfile (Node + GDAL + numpy + pyproj + Pillow + mcp, all pinned). The repo is mounted over the image, so you edit live; the pinned toolchain comes from the image.
postCreateCommand: node --version && python3 -c "from osgeo import gdal; import numpy, pyproj, PIL; print('GDAL', gdal.__version__, '| numpy', numpy.__version__, '| pyproj', pyproj.__version__)"
